Class App

java.lang.Object
app.App
public class App extends Object
Central application controller and facade for the Mizan budget app.

Owns the main JFrame and all control-layer managers. Every UI screen holds a reference to this class and calls its methods to perform business logic or navigate between screens. This keeps the UI screens decoupled from the control and persistence layers.

Startup flow:

  1. If a PIN is set → show LockScreen.
  2. Else if no active cycle exists → show SetupScreen.
  3. Otherwise → show DashboardScreen.

    Modifier and Type
    Field
    Description
    private AuthManager
    authManager
    Handles PIN authentication and lockout logic.
    private CycleManager
    cycleManager
    Manages budget cycle lifecycle (create, reset, end).
    private ExpenseManager
    expenseManager
    Manages expense and category CRUD operations.
    private JFrame
    frame
    The single application window.
    private LimitCalculator
    limitCalculator
    Calculates and recalculates the daily spending limit.

  • Constructor Summary

    Constructors
    Constructor
    Description
    App()
    Constructs the App, initialises all managers, applies the dark theme, creates the main window, and routes to the correct startup screen.

  • Field Details

    • frame

      private JFrame frame
      The single application window.

    • cycleManager

      private CycleManager cycleManager
      Manages budget cycle lifecycle (create, reset, end).

    • expenseManager

      private ExpenseManager expenseManager
      Manages expense and category CRUD operations.

    • limitCalculator

      Calculates and recalculates the daily spending limit.

      Handles PIN authentication and lockout logic.

  • Constructor Details

    • App

      App()
      Constructs the App, initialises all managers, applies the dark theme, creates the main window, and routes to the correct startup screen.

  • Method Details

    • getActiveCycle

      public BudgetCycle getActiveCycle()
      Returns the current active budget cycle from the database.
      Returns:
      active BudgetCycle, or null if none exists

    • initializeCycle

      public BudgetCycle initializeCycle(double allowance, LocalDate start, LocalDate end)
      Creates and activates a new budget cycle.
      Parameters:
      allowance - total budget in EGP
      start - cycle start date
      end - cycle end date
      Returns:
      the newly created BudgetCycle

    • resetCycle

      public void resetCycle()
      Permanently deletes the current cycle and all its expense data.

    • logExpense

      public Expense logExpense(double amount, int categoryId)
      Logs a new expense under the active cycle.
      Parameters:
      amount - monetary value in EGP
      categoryId - ID of the category to assign
      Returns:
      the persisted Expense with its generated ID set

    • getExpenses

      public List<Expense> getExpenses()
      Returns all expenses for the active cycle.
      Returns:
      list of Expense objects

    • getExpensesByCategory

      public List<Expense> getExpensesByCategory(int categoryId)
      Returns all expenses for a specific category in the active cycle.
      Parameters:
      categoryId - the category to filter by
      Returns:
      filtered list of Expense objects

    • editExpense

      public void editExpense(int id, double amount, int categoryId)
      Updates the amount and category of an existing expense.
      Parameters:
      id - database ID of the expense to edit
      amount - new amount in EGP
      categoryId - new category ID

    • deleteExpense

      public void deleteExpense(int id)
      Permanently deletes an expense record.
      Parameters:
      id - database ID of the expense to delete

    • getTodaySpent

      public double getTodaySpent()
      Returns the total amount spent today in the active cycle.
      Returns:
      today's spending in EGP

    • getCategories

      public List<Category> getCategories()
      Returns all expense categories.
      Returns:
      list of all Category objects

    • insertCategory

      public Category insertCategory(String name)
      Creates and persists a new expense category with no icon.
      Parameters:
      name - display name for the new category
      Returns:
      the newly created Category with its generated ID set

    • deleteCategory

      public void deleteCategory(int id)
      Permanently deletes a category from the database.
      Parameters:
      id - database ID of the category to delete

    • getDailyLimit

      public double getDailyLimit()
      Recalculates and returns the recommended daily spending limit for today, rounded up to the nearest EGP.
      Returns:
      daily limit in EGP (ceiling-rounded)

    • getLimitCalculator

      public LimitCalculator getLimitCalculator()
      Returns the LimitCalculator instance for direct use by screens.
      Returns:
      the shared limit calculator

    • getAuthManager

      public AuthManager getAuthManager()
      Returns the AuthManager instance for PIN and lockout operations.
      Returns:
      the shared auth manager

    • showSetupScreen

      public void showSetupScreen()
      Replaces the frame content with the SetupScreen.

    • showDashboardScreen

      public void showDashboardScreen()
      Replaces the frame content with the DashboardScreen.

    • showExpenseLoggingScreen

      public void showExpenseLoggingScreen()
      Replaces the frame content with the ExpenseLoggingScreen.

    • showHistoryScreen

      public void showHistoryScreen()
      Replaces the frame content with the HistoryScreen.

    • showSettingsScreen

      public void showSettingsScreen()
      Replaces the frame content with the SettingsScreen.

    • showLockScreen

      public void showLockScreen()
      Replaces the frame content with the LockScreen.
